name: Zucchini

pros.title: excellent volume-for-calories trade
pros.explanation: That is the clearest reason zucchini keeps earning a place in everyday meals.

pros.title: adds meal bulk with very little downside
pros.explanation: It helps stretch meals without bringing much calorie baggage.

pros.title: very easy to integrate into regular cooking
pros.explanation: That practical ease is one of its more honest advantages.

cons.title: fibre is only modest
cons.explanation: It is fine, but it does not create much separation against stronger vegetables.

cons.title: micronutrient density is not especially standout
cons.explanation: Useful enough, but clearly below the category's heavy hitters.

cons.title: it offers less distinctive upside than elite vegetables
cons.explanation: Its main win is ease and low downside rather than a huge special nutritional punch.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
